untranslatable_reason: Head-and-shoulders pattern detection requires multi-bar peak/trough identification, shoulder comparison logic, neckline deviation calculation, and pattern height measurements. These structural pattern elements cannot be expressed as simple indicator comparisons with the allowed operators (>, <, >=, <=, ==, crosses_above, crosses_below, is). The signal requires: (1) identification of local peaks/troughs across multiple bars, (2) ratio comparisons between shoulder and head heights (1.2x dominance), (3) neckline symmetry tolerance calculation, and (4) pattern formation time validation—all of which require custom pattern-recognition logic beyond indicator thresholds.
translation_notes: Translated only the uptrend context requirement (close > sma_50) as an entry filter. The core head-and-shoulders pattern recognition, shoulder validation (left shoulder > prior peak/trough by 1 ATR), head dominance (1.2x shoulder height), right shoulder constraints, and neckline deviation tolerance all require algorithmic pattern detection with multi-bar state tracking. Parameters provided (uptrend_qualification_atr_multiple: 1.0, head_dominance_ratio: 1.2, neckline_symmetry_tolerance_pct: 10, min_pattern_bars: 12) cannot be operationalized using only simple indicator comparisons.
